decision_points.description: Inoculate each growth condition at the cited starting OD600 of 0.05.

citations.title: RqcH supports survival in the absence of non-stop ribosome rescue factors
citations.tier_justification: Peer-reviewed E. coli growth-curve protocol using a starting OD600 of 0.05.

decision_points.description: Use the cited 15-minute OD600 measurement interval.

citations.title: RqcH supports survival in the absence of non-stop ribosome rescue factors
citations.tier_justification: Peer-reviewed E. coli growth-curve protocol collecting OD600 measurements every 15 minutes.

decision_points.description: Collect enough usable OD600 points for the fit tool to return analyzable results for all three conditions.

citations.title: The E. coli molecular phenotype under different growth conditions
citations.tier_justification: Peer-reviewed E. coli growth study fitting doubling times only within the cited OD600 window.

insufficient_growth_points.canonical_diagnosis: The OD600 trajectory did not contain enough measurements in the cited fitting window to estimate a reliable doubling time.
acceptable_variants: There were not enough OD600 points in the usable fitting range.
The growth curve was undersampled for doubling-time estimation.

citations.title: The E. coli molecular phenotype under different growth conditions
citations.tier_justification: Peer-reviewed E. coli growth study explicitly constraining the OD600 window used for doubling-time estimation.
